author: Simon Bissonnette
name: 11L EMA + BigramHash(12288) + Mixed Int5 + FA3
blurb: 11 layers, 3x MLP, EMA(0.997), BigramHash(12288), mixed int5 quantization, and stride-64 sliding evaluation. Three clean seeds average 1.13536615 val_bpb, all under the 16,000,000-byte cap. Uses FlashAttention-3 via kernels-community/flash-attn3; README explicitly discloses runtime FA3 kernel fetching.
